notes: SHIP v1.14.215 — CRASH-LOG HARDENING (per HANDOFF-v1.14.214-crashlog-hardening.md; spec targeted .214 but that stamp was already used by the deploy-tap fix, so this lands as .215 on this line). Code-only, dct-ios.html + 2 lockstep stamps; NO asset/markup change. The DCT-04 global error handler (30-entry ring @ phantom_crash_log, onerror+unhandledrejection, tap-to-view banner, EDP per-section diag) had three defects, all fixed: (1) NO COPY-OUT — phantomViewCrashLog() was a confirm() truncated to 1500 chars; the whole use case (tech copies a trace, pastes it to owner) was impossible. Now copies the FULL log to clipboard via navigator.clipboard.writeText INSIDE the banner-tap gesture (iOS honors writes only inside a direct user gesture; the banner onclick IS the gesture), with a header + haptic([8]) feedback + graceful fallback (if clipboard write is rejected the alert still shows the trace to screenshot — no dead-end). (2) NO PER-ENTRY VERSION STAMP — entries lacked PHANTOM_APP_VERSION so you couldn't tell if an error predates a fix. Added `v:` (typeof-guarded against the early-boot IIFE window) to all 3 writers: logCrash() + the 2 EDP diag writes (edp_section_fail, edp_run_summary). (3) AUTO-CLEAR WAS A NO-OP — sameVersion() compared src FILENAMES, always 'dct-ios.html' on every version, so the 'drop errors from prior file versions' filter never fired and stale errors from fixed builds persisted (ghost-chasing). Rewrote sameVersion(entry) to key off entry.v === current PHANTOM_APP_VERSION; un-stamped legacy (pre-.215) entries are kept once via the !entry.v guard, then age out of the 30-slot ring — no mass-wipe on the .215 boot. Schema is additive (old readers ignore .v) so rollback is clean, no key migration. SW CACHE_VERSION bumped .214->.215: stamp-only (no precache LIST change) but REQUIRED so devices fetch the new dct-ios.html bytes — without it the SW serves the cached .214 and all 4 edits look like a no-op (same gotcha as the .213 plate swap). Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline HTML blocks · CSS braces unchanged (delta 0, no CSS touched) · CRLF preserved · grep: `v: (typeof PHANTOM_APP_VERSION`=3, `currentFile`=0 · three-stamp lockstep .214->.215. ROLLBACK: git revert (restores confirm()-only viewer, un-stamped entries, inert filename auto-clear). SHIP-ORDER NOTE: first ship of a new batch after .213-.214 (device-verified 'all good' 2026-07-09). DEVICE-VERIFY (hard stop): remove+re-add PWA (URL cache-bust does NOT bypass a registered SW — let the new SW activate); confirm app reads v1.14.215, then: (1) force a window.onerror → orange crash banner appears; (2) tap banner → toast/haptic fires, alert header shows v1.14.215, each entry line shows ` · v1.14.215`; (3) paste clipboard into Notes/Messages → FULL log landed (not the 1400-char preview), with header + stamps; (4) stale-clear: .215 entries survive reboot (same version kept); optional: hand-edit an entry .v to a fake older version, reload, confirm it's dropped while .215 stays; (5) iOS clipboard-deny: if no 'Copied' toast, alert still shows the trace to screenshot. If banner/version reads unchanged → SW cache-key bump didn't take, check first.
